top_findings.title: Run marked as failed during execution

top_findings.title: No Java source code generated
top_findings.evidence: find . -name '*.java' returns no results; expected com.braziliansoccer.mcp package with Main class and data loaders
top_findings.suggestion: Agent failed to generate implementation — check agent logs for errors during code generation

top_findings.title: MCP server main class not implemented
top_findings.evidence: pom.xml line 108 references com.braziliansoccer.mcp.BrazilianSoccerMcpServer but file does not exist
top_findings.suggestion: Implement BrazilianSoccerMcpServer with MCP protocol initialization

top_findings.title: Match data loading not implemented
top_findings.evidence: No source code found; CSV loader classes missing for Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv
top_findings.suggestion: Implement CSV parsing and in-memory indexing for all 5 match datasets

top_findings.title: Player data loading not implemented

top_findings.suggestion: Implement player data parsing and search/filter capabilities
